data.title: Director of Influencer & Brand Partnerships
data.jd_text: The Director of Influencer & Brand Partnerships is responsible for leading the strategic vision, growth, and performance of Ego & East’s Talent Management division. This role oversees the management and development of a roster of talents, including high-profile and celebrity figures, while driving innovative brand partnerships that strengthen the agency’s market positioning and revenue growth. This position requires a forward-thinking leader who combines strategic planning with hands-on execution, ensuring that all talent and brand initiatives align with long-term business goals. The Director will manage a growing team, build and nurture key client relationships, and oversee negotiations and partnership activations across the MENA region and beyond. The ideal candidate will bring a deep understanding of influencer marketing, brand strategy, and the luxury and lifestyle landscape, with proven experience in driving large-scale partnerships and managing high-performing teams. JOB DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES Business Development & Growth Own and drive the commercial growth of the Talent & Partnerships division, with clear accountability for revenue targets and overall performance. Identify, develop, and secure high-value brand partnerships, collaborations, and new business opportunities across regional and international markets. Leverage an established network of brands, agencies, and decision-makers to generate leads and convert them into long-term partnerships. Lead the development of strategic proposals, RFP responses, and partnership frameworks, ensuring innovative and competitive positioning. Continuously identify new revenue streams, market opportunities, and expansion areas to scale the division sustainably. Influencer / Talent Strategy & Relationship Management Define and lead the long-term vision and positioning of the talent roster, ensuring alignment with market trends and business objectives. Oversee the management and development of high-profile and emerging talent, driving growth, visibility, and commercial success. Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with talents, acting as a senior advisor on career strategy, partnerships, and brand positioning. Identify, attract, and sign top-tier and high-potential talent that strengthens the agency’s portfolio and competitive edge. Oversee and lead all negotiations for brand deals, ensuring optimal value, alignment, and long-term partnership opportunities. Brand Partnerships & Strategic Collaborations Build and nurture strong relationships with key brands, partners, and stakeholders across luxury, fashion, and lifestyle industries. Act as a senior point of contact for strategic partnerships, ensuring high-level client servicing and long-term collaboration success. Drive the ideation and execution of innovative campaigns and partnerships that elevate both talent and brand positioning. Collaborate cross-functionally with PR, marketing, events, and creative teams to deliver integrated and impactful campaigns. Team Leadership & Development Lead, structure, and scale a high-performing Talent & Partnerships team, ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, and performance expectations. Provide strong leadership, mentorship, and direction to senior and mid-level team members, fostering a high-performance culture. Establish processes, frameworks, and best practices to ensure operational excellence and scalability of the division. Oversee team performance, ensuring alignment with business goals, client expectations, and agency standards. KNOWLEDGE & EXPERIENCE 10–12+ years of experience in talent management, influencer marketing, brand partnerships, or related fields, with significant leadership exposure. Strong background in luxury, fashion, and lifestyle industries. Proven track record in business development, revenue generation, and securing high-value partnerships. Established network across brands, influencers, agencies, and key industry stakeholders. Experience managing and scaling teams and business units. Fluency in English (Arabic or French is a plus). SKILLS & ABILITIES Exceptional leadership and strategic planning abilities. Strong business acumen and client relationship management. Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills. Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously. Creative and analytical mindset with an eye for market opportunities. Confident, adaptable, and proactive in driving new initiatives and growth. If you’re interested, please share your resume at hr@maisonpyramide.com .

data.title: Head of Asset Management
data.jd_text: Head of Asset Management We are seeking a visionary and results-driven Head of Asset Management to lead our multi-asset investment platform. This senior leadership role will shape and execute the firm’s investment strategy, drive portfolio performance, and ensure excellence in risk management and governance across all asset classes. Role Overview As Head of Asset Management, you will provide strategic oversight of the firm’s investment platform, lead high-performing teams, and act as a key investment decision-maker. You will play a pivotal role in delivering superior risk-adjusted returns, fostering innovation, and engaging institutional and high-net-worth clients. Key Responsibilities Define and execute multi-asset investment strategy and asset allocation Oversee portfolio performance, risk management, and investment governance Chair the Investment Committee and drive investment decision-making Lead product innovation across traditional and alternative asset classes Serve as senior investment spokesperson to clients and stakeholders Build, mentor, and inspire a high-caliber investment team Qualifications 12+ years of investment management experience with multi-asset exposure Proven leadership of institutional-scale portfolios and teams Deep expertise across public and private markets Demonstrated track record of delivering consistent, risk-adjusted performance CFA, CAIA, MBA, or equivalent preferred

data.title: Director of Franchise Development
data.jd_text:
We are seeking Disruptive Entrepreneurs with Great Networking, Strategic, Execution & Business Advisory Skills and NOT Pure Job Seekers.
About the CompanyFranchiseBazar is expanding across the UAE and searching for passionate, high-caliber individuals ready to establish and scale their own franchise consultancy. Become the Co-founder /Co-Owner/CEO/MD of your business, backed by the global expertise of FranchiseBazar, and play a pivotal role in accelerating franchising and new business models in the UAE market.
About the RoleAs a Franchise Development Director reporting to the Principal Chief Executive Officer / Managing Partner, Co-Founder & Country Master Franchisee Owner, you’ll lead a dynamic business in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, or Ajman, representing FranchiseBazar’s portfolio of 4000+ global and regional brands.
ResponsibilitiesConnect entrepreneurs, business buyers, investors, and SMEs with innovative franchise business opportunities every day.Advise SMEs, family offices, and local businesses to become franchise-ready and drive scalable growth.Enable UAE-based brands to expand across the Middle East, Indian Subcontinent, and beyond — while bringing international brands to the UAE.Offer A-Z franchise development solutions and be integral to the evolution of business models in one of the world’s hottest commercial hubs.
QualificationsSenior Investors / Management professionals (CXO, Director, Partner, VP, Head of Business, Consultants) looking for high-growth business and franchise opportunities.Minimum investment of 150,000 AED and a 300 sq ft dedicated office in Dubai (or similar commitment in other major UAE cities).If you are already operating a consultancy / advisory / brokerage business - franchise consultancy could be a natural diversification + addition and you could start getting great results and profitability, instantly.Option to start as a unit franchisee in major cities for 100,000 AED in Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, Ajman.
Required SkillsWell-networked individuals in UAE’s business, investment, real estate, government, and corporate sectors.English fluency is a must; knowledge of Arabic or other languages is a strong plus.Ability to recruit, manage, and inspire a branch network, as well as collaborate with other consultants, brokers, real estate professionals, and financial advisors.Proven business development skills and daily access to entrepreneurs, investors, and new clients from your existing network.
Preferred SkillsExperience in business advisory, consulting, investment deals, franchise or business brokerage, or management roles or real estate or franchise sales or franchise consulting.Strong track record in new business development, franchising, sales strategies, retail, construction, banking, financial advisory, or event management.Working successfully with entrepreneurs, start-ups, business buyers, and investors.Experience in corporate leadership, B2B consulting, strategy, or building high-level client relationships.
Pay range and compensation packageOperate as a business owner under an exclusive country license — not as an employee.Potential to earn a 70% share of revenues from your deals closed, with no upper limit.Pure performance-based remuneration: the more you scale your consulting and franchise sales business, the more you earn.Access to world-class training to become a certified franchise consultant in UAE.
Equal Opportunity StatementNo fixed monthly packages – this is an entrepreneurial, commission-only growth model built for leaders ready to make their mark in the booming franchise and consulting sector of the UAE.
Ready to Own Your Success? If you’re hungry to launch a franchise consulting business in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah or any major UAE city, have the required investment, and possess a network you believe in, this is your platform!
We are also seeking Exclusive Master Franchise Partners for Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Egypt, Turkey & Jordan. Ask for a Detailed Presentation Should you be interested in any of the above country.
Email your CV with the subject “YES I Am Interested to Explore A Country Master Franchisee” to MENA@FranchiseBazar.com.
Let’s connect and write your next success story together!

data.title: Head of Data
data.location: Global Village, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Who We Are The Solana Foundation is a non-profit based in Zug, Switzerland, dedicated to the adoption, decentralization, and security of the Solana network. Solana is a high performance blockchain that can deliver a fast and friendly user experience, without sacrificing security. The Solana Foundation is working to realize a world where individuals own their data, use permissionless networks, and transfer information and value freely around the world. We are looking for talented people who are willing to jump right in and use their expertise to help the ecosystem build. The Opportunity The Solana Foundation is seeking a Head of Data to own our data strategy and lead the team that powers ecosystem intelligence across DeFi, developer activity, payments, stablecoins, RWA, and network economics. This role is for someone who is as comfortable setting a multi-year data vision as they are reviewing pipelines or diving deep into the data themselves. You’ll manage a team of subject matter experts across multiple verticals, own the Foundation’s external data partnerships, and ensure that the right decisions are made with the right information. The bar is high: we’re not looking for better dashboards—we’re looking for someone who can make data a true competitive advantage for the Solana ecosystem. To be Successful in this Role You will: Define and own the Foundation’s data strategy—what we measure, why it matters, and how it informs decisions across the organization Lead a team of analysts and analytics engineers, each owning a specific ecosystem vertical, and synthesize their work into a coherent cross-vertical perspective Own relationships with the Foundation’s ecosystem data providers, ensuring coverage, quality, and methodological rigor Work closely with client teams (like Anza, Firedancer, Jito, Temporal, etc.) on data-driven assessments of Solana protocol upgrades Drive the data infrastructure roadmap and make decisions on tooling, gaps, and new partnerships Represent the Foundation’s data perspective in executive conversations and external forums You will have: 5+ years of experience in data, with at least 3 years leading a team or function Deep familiarity with on-chain data—you understand what the metrics mean and where they break down Fluency across DeFi, developer ecosystem, stablecoins, payments, and network economics metrics Strong technical foundation in SQL and Python, with hands-on experience managing a big data platform using modern data warehousing tools (Databricks, Snowflake, ClickHouse, etc.) Proven track record managing external data vendor relationships—not just consuming outputs Strong communicator who can translate complex, multi-signal analysis for non-technical stakeholders Bonus Points: Prior experience at a blockchain foundation, protocol, or DeFi analytics platform Familiarity with Solana’s account model, fee mechanics, and program ecosystem Existing relationships with analytics teams and data providers in the Solana ecosystem

data.title: Client Services Director
data.jd_text: CLIENT SERVICES DIRECTOR About Us Founded in 2003, we’ve built a legacy of unforgettable experiences across the Middle East. From cultural festivals to flagship public events, our work blends logistical excellence with creative ambition to shape moments that matter. We are LINKVIVA — creators of experiences that live beyond the day. Our Energy (Values) – The 5Ps 👫 People – We rise by lifting others. 🌈 Positivity – We see the light, even in chaos. 🎯 Perfection – Not flawless. But fearless in chasing better. 🧭 Pioneering – We break molds, not rules. ❤️ Passion – We lead with fire in the belly. Why You Should Join Us 🤝 Lead Client Partnerships: Be the senior face of LINKVIVA, owning key relationships and shaping long-term success. 🎯 Drive Winning Strategy: Take ownership of RFPs, pitches, and strategic direction to convert opportunities into accounts. 📈 Make a Real Impact: Play a pivotal role in growing and retaining business while leading a high-performing client services team. About the Role As a Client Services Director, you will lead the client services function, managing a team of Account Directors while owning the strategic direction of client partnerships. You will be responsible for winning and converting new business opportunities, ensuring they transition into strong, long-term accounts. Acting as the bridge between Business Development and Project Delivery, you will take ownership of the RFP and pitch process, before handing over to Project Management for execution. This role is less about pure business development and more about strategic conversion, relationship building, and account growth — ensuring every opportunity is maximised and nurtured into ongoing partnerships. What You’ll Do • Lead Client Relationships – Act as the senior point of contact, building strong, trusted partnerships. • Manage & Mentor Account Directors – Oversee performance, provide guidance, and ensure excellence across accounts. • Own the RFP Process – Lead from brief to pitch submission, ensuring high-quality, winning proposals. • Define Winning Strategies – Shape the right approach, messaging, and positioning for each opportunity. • Convert Opportunities into Accounts – Work closely with Business Development to turn new leads into long-term clients. • Drive Account Growth & Retention – Identify opportunities to expand existing accounts and maximise value. • Ensure Smooth Handover – Transition successfully won projects to Project Management teams. • Represent LINKVIVA – Be the face of the business, confident and credible in all client interactions. • Communicate with Impact – Deliver strong presentations and maintain clear, professional communication. • Navigate Client Relationships Diplomatically – Handle challenges with tact, ensuring positive outcomes without damaging relationships. • Bring Energy & Drive – Show persistence, hunger, and a proactive mindset to continuously grow the business. About You You should be: ✔ A Senior Client Services Leader – With proven experience managing teams and leading accounts. ✔ Commercially Minded – Focused on winning, converting, and growing business opportunities. ✔ A Strategic Thinker – Able to develop winning pitch strategies and client approaches. ✔ An Exceptional Communicator – Confident in presentations and senior stakeholder management. ✔ A Strong Leader – Able to mentor and develop Account Directors. ✔ Diplomatic & Relationship-Focused – Skilled at managing clients with professionalism and tact. ✔ Driven & Persistent – Bringing energy, ownership, and hunger to grow the business. ✔ A Credible Representative – Comfortable being the face of the agency. What You Need to Apply ✅ Strong experience and understanding of mega events and festivals ✅ Experience working with governmental clients preferably within the tourism sector ✅ Proven track record in RFPs, pitching, and winning business ✅ Experience managing senior client relationships and teams ✅ Strong commercial and strategic mindset ✅ Arabic speaking is a plus ✅ Fluent written & spoken English

data.title: Director Analytics Business Engagement
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Miral Experiences is a region’s leader in the management and operation of world-class, award-winning immersive attractions and experiences across Abu Dhabi. Our diverse portfolio includes some of the most iconic entertainment and leisure destinations, including Ferrari World Yas Island Abu Dhabi, Yas Waterworld Yas Island Abu Dhabi, Warner Bros. World™ Yas Island Abu Dhabi, SeaWorld Yas Island Abu Dhabi, CLYMB™ Yas Island Abu Dhabi, and TeamLab. Phenomena Abu Dhabi, and CLYMB™ Abu Dhabi, as well as cultural treasures like Qasr Al Watan. We specialize in crafting unique experiences that cater to all tastes and ages, delivering a seamless blend of thrills, joy, and discovery. Our attractions are designed to ignite the imagination and create unforgettable memories for visitors from around the world. Whether you're seeking excitement, relaxation, or cultural enrichment, we offer something for everyone. Job Summary Shape the future of data-driven decision-making by bridging the gap between business strategy and cutting-edge analytics. In this role, you’ll lead high-impact engagement with business leaders, translating complex data insights into clear, actionable strategies that drive measurable value across the organization. Your expertise will prioritize and deliver analytics projects aligned with business goals, foster a culture of data literacy, and champion innovation through cross-functional collaboration. The ideal candidate brings 10+ years of senior leadership in analytics or business engagement, with a strong foundation in data tools like SQL and Power BI, paired with exceptional stakeholder management and strategic communication skills. You’ll thrive in an environment where your ability to simplify insights for executives and champion change initiatives will directly influence business performance. This is your opportunity to turn data into a competitive advantage while shaping the next evolution of analytics within the company. Responsibilities Build and maintain strong relationships with business leaders to understand their goals and data needs Act as a strategic advisor to communicate the value of data analytics in achieving business objectives Work with senior management to align analytics initiatives with business priorities Identify key opportunities to leverage data to enhance business performance Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify, prioritize, and deliver impactful data analytics projects Lead change management efforts to drive data literacy and a data-driven culture across business units Develop and implement strategies for data-driven transformation and insights Establish and monitor KPIs to assess the impact of data initiatives on business outcomes Act as the primary voice for the Data Analytics Department in business forums Translate complex analytical insights into actionable business recommendations for non-technical audiences Identify opportunities to improve business engagement processes and data workflows Promote best practices in data governance, data quality, and compliance Keep abreast of industry trends and emerging technologies in data analytics Bring innovative solutions to business engagement and problem-solving Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in business, Data Science, Analytics, or a related field Master’s degree or MBA is preferred 10+ years in business engagement, analytics, or related field 5 years in a senior leadership role change management

data.title: Head of Information Technology
data.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: We're partnered with a growing, forward-thinking organisation seeking a Head of IT. This is a pivotal leadership role for a well-rounded IT professional who thrives in both strategic planning and hands-on environments. Key Responsibilities - Define and execute the organisation’s IT strategy aligned with business goals - Oversee all aspects of IT, including infrastructure, networks, applications, security, hardware, and software - Lead cybersecurity initiatives, ensuring robust protection, compliance, and risk management - Advise the business on IT architecture, systems implementation, and digital transformation - Manage vendors, budgets, and IT roadmaps - Drive continuous improvement and introduce scalable processes and governance - Explore and implement emerging technologies, including AI-driven solutions, where appropriate Requirements - Proven experience in a senior IT leadership role - Strong generalist IT background across infrastructure, networks, applications, and security - Experience working in SMEs or scaling businesses, with the ability to introduce enterprise-level practices - Strategic thinker with a hands-on approach when needed - Demonstrated experience advising leadership teams and influencing business decisions - Solid understanding of cybersecurity frameworks and risk management - Exposure to or interest in AI technologies and their business applications For further information or a confidential discussion, please get in touch.

data.title: Deputy Head of Compliance & Compliance Manager
data.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Multiple Hires: Deputy Head of Compliance & Compliance Manager Location: Dubai or Abu Dhabi Sector: FinTech (Digital Financial Services) Availability: Immediately Available OR 2 week's notice maximum. Overview We are partnering with a high-growth FinTech firm in the UAE, operating at the intersection of AI and financial services. As part of a strategic build-out, the firm is establishing a best-in-class Compliance function and is seeking both a Deputy Head of Compliance and a Compliance Manager to support this journey. These are hands-on roles suited to experienced generalist compliance professionals who can operate across advisory, monitoring, and regulatory engagement within a dynamic and evolving environment. Key Responsibilities: Regulatory & Advisory Provide day-to-day compliance advisory across the business, including product, operations, and technology teams Interpret and implement regulatory requirements under FSRA and CBUAE frameworks Support the development and launch of new products in line with applicable regulations Framework Development Assist in building and enhancing the Compliance framework, including policies, procedures, and controls Ensure alignment with UAE regulatory expectations and international best practices Contribute to the ongoing development of a scalable compliance infrastructure Monitoring & Testing Design and execute Compliance Monitoring Programmes (CMP) Conduct thematic reviews and control testing across key risk areas Track and report on remediation actions Regulatory Engagement Support interactions with regulators, including FSRA and CBUAE Assist in regulatory filings, reporting, and ongoing supervisory requirements Governance & Reporting Prepare management information (MI) and reports for senior management and governance committees Escalate key compliance risks and issues in a timely manner

data.title: VP, Client Service Engineering - GTB Stream
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Reporting directly to the Head of Client Service Engineering, the VP Client Service Engineering plays a pivotal role in driving end-to-end change through process reengineering, automation, and efficiency improvements. He/She will lead multiple client service priorities, collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders, and ensure the successful execution of initiatives that align with the bank's strategic objectives. Service Journey Reimagination Lead the redesign of client service journeys to ensure they are client-centric, efficient, and risk-controlled. Drive end-to-end process optimization and automation initiatives. Service Delivery & Performance Management Ensure delivery and scalability of redesigned service journeys, coordinating cross-functional teams. Monitor and report progress on key KPI’s across CX, Scalability and Risk. Stakeholder Engagement & Change Leadership Engage with key stakeholders across business domains to align on service priorities and drive change. Champion a culture of agile, fast-paced, and repeatable deliver, fostering innovation, agility, and continuous improvement. Familiarity with change management frameworks (e.g., ADKAR, Kotter) is desirable. Continuous Improvement & Innovation Identify opportunities for ongoing process improvement and innovation, including piloting AI and automation solutions. Contribute to the adoption of structured toolkits, best practices, innovation, set-up playbooks, and frameworks for consistent service delivery. Reporting & Communication Provide regular updates to senior management and governance forums on progress, risks, and key decisions. Prepare, contribute, present materials for GCOO, ExCo-X and other executive committees as required.

data.title: Facilities Asset Management Director (FM Operations)
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Miral Experiences is a region’s leader in the management and operation of world-class, award-winning immersive attractions and experiences across Abu Dhabi. Our diverse portfolio includes some of the most iconic entertainment and leisure destinations, including Ferrari World Yas Island Abu Dhabi, Yas Waterworld Yas Island Abu Dhabi, Warner Bros. World™ Yas Island Abu Dhabi, SeaWorld Yas Island Abu Dhabi, CLYMB™ Yas Island Abu Dhabi, and TeamLab. Phenomena Abu Dhabi, and CLYMB™ Abu Dhabi, as well as cultural treasures like Qasr Al Watan. We specialize in crafting unique experiences that cater to all tastes and ages, delivering a seamless blend of thrills, joy, and discovery. Our attractions are designed to ignite the imagination and create unforgettable memories for visitors from around the world. Whether you're seeking excitement, relaxation, or cultural enrichment, we offer something for everyone. Job Summary Lead the future of asset management in a dynamic theme park environment where innovation meets operational excellence. As the Facilities Asset Management Director, you’ll oversee a team of 30-40 professionals to ensure seamless maintenance, safety, and efficiency across HVAC, electrical, civil, and fire safety systems while driving cost-effective CAPEX and OPEX strategies. With 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience and a proven track record in managing technical teams, you’ll develop preventive maintenance programs, negotiate vendor contracts, and align facility upgrades with business goals—all while prioritizing guest and colleague safety. Bring technical expertise in BMS, water treatment, and fire suppression systems alongside strong leadership and stakeholder communication to deliver flawless operations. Expect a role where your strategic vision directly shapes asset performance, budget optimization, and the guest experience, backed by professional growth opportunities in a fast-paced, high-impact environment. Responsibilities Supervision and management of all Facilities Plan, direct, control and manage all aspects of the leisure facility maintenance Manage Division P&L, periodically meeting with Finance and/or Senior Director of General Services to discuss Expenditure vs. Budget Conducting performance reviews for direct reporting Colleagues and disciplinary actions within the team Supervision of contractors / vendors working within the parks Approving the 3rd Party Contractor of monthly manpower scheduling Project management of new construction on various scales in line with parks strategies Approval of Preventative Maintenance (PM) and Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) programs ready for implementation to Computer Managed Maintenance System (CMMS) tool Ensures proper inventory levels for spare parts for all facilities equipment Assisting other departments with facilities related tasks/issues Assisting all facilities department Colleagues in their day-to-day tasks if needs be Signing off work completion certificates Ensuring training programs are delivered to all Colleagues to obtain annual and quarterly training hours Liaising with park(s) operational departments to ensure their needs are met Managing Service Requests (SR) and ensuring they are completed in a timely manner Monitoring departmental Key Performance Indicators (KPI) and strategic initiatives Technical reviews of documentation Monitoring of facilities PM tasks ensuring the PM schedule is set appropriately to maintain the best possible efficiency of equipment with reduced equipment down-times / breakdowns Monitoring the CMMS data is entered accurately and on time Working closely with other Maintenance teams to ensure the Maintenance department functions efficiently Ensuring the parks’ assets are maintained to the highest level of quality and performance Reviewing Service Level Agreements (SLA) and contracts in-line with the procurement processes Ensuring all Fire Life Safety Systems (FLS) are working correctly at all times Informing the business units and concerned parties of any scheduled interruption to facilities equipment Ensuring the properties are always safe for Colleagues and Guests as a priority Provide the necessary input for setting facilities budgets Ensure that the facilities meet the government health and environmental regulations such as HACCP, firefighting systems and others Ensure that items in the Safety Log from HSE are attended to and rectified in a timely manner Ensure all Colleagues within the group are properly trained and utilize all safety equipment issued to them to reduce workplace injuries and accidents Oversee facility/attraction installation processes to ensure the installation meets all the requirements set forth in the contract, specifications and drawings Participate in facility/attraction design review processes to communicate operational improvements to designers Participate in facilities/attractions refurbishment program by developing scope requirements, budget requirements, and schedule Ens

data.title: Managing Director, Asset Allocation
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Title: Managing Director, Asset Allocation Location: Hong Kong and Singapore Reporting To: Investment Advisory Committee (IAC) The Opportunity A prestigious, multi-generational Single Family Office (SFO) headquartered in Singapore is seeking an exceptional investment leader to serve as Managing Director, Asset Allocation . As the architect of the family’s long-term investment legacy, you will lead a high-performing platform of 30+ professionals across both Front-Office Investment and Middle/Back-Office Operations. This is a rare, high-stature "hybrid" mandate that demands the intellectual rigor of a Sovereign Wealth Fund (SWF) combined with the agility, discretion, and entrepreneurial spirit of a premier private investment platform. The Role: Strategic Orchestration & Ecosystem Leadership Total Portfolio Strategy: Oversee a sophisticated global multi-asset strategy, balancing long-term strategic targets to navigate macro cycles. Institutional Frameworks: Implement world-class investment governance (mirroring SWF, Pension, or Endowment standards) to ensure capital preservation while capturing alpha across diverse liquidity profiles. GP Relationship Mastery: Leverage a deep global network to secure “first call” access to top-tier Private Equity funds, co-investments, and direct secondary opportunities. Ecosystem Representation: Act as the firm’s primary representative within the Singapore and global financial ecosystem. You will foster critical relationships with regional regulators, peer family offices, and institutional partners. Trusted Advisory: Serve as a high-touch advisor to the Principals and the IAC, translating complex market dynamics into actionable, high-conviction investment themes. Operational Stewardship: Provide strategic leadership to both the investment and operations teams, ensuring a seamless, institutional-grade lifecycle from deal execution to settlement and risk reporting. The Profile: Visionary Leadership & Uncompromising Integrity 20+ Years of Distinguished Experience: A proven career path with significant tenure at a top-tier SWF, large-scale endowment, or global asset manager is essential. Multi-Asset Mastery: A verifiable track record of delivering superior risk-adjusted returns through various market cycles, with deep expertise in complex portfolio construction. Global Network Advantage: An established, "ready-to-use" network of Tier-1 GP relationships and industry titans. Leadership Gravitas: Natural ability to lead a sizable multi-disciplinary team and the emotional intelligence to influence and partner with very hands-on Principals. Ethics & Discretion: Demonstrates the highest level of ethical standards and absolute discretion… qualities essential for representing a prominent family in high-stakes negotiations and global markets. Academic Excellence: Advanced degree (Master’s or MBA) from a leading global institution; CFA or CAIA designations are highly preferred. To explore this mandate, please submit your CV for a confidential discussion. Only shortlisted candidates of the highest caliber will be contacted.

data.title: Project Director (Residential)
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text:
Overview

At AtkinsRéalis, we are seeking an experienced Project Director with a strong background in complex building projects. This role requires a forward-thinking leader with over 20 years of experience managing large, multi-disciplinary teams on complex construction projects.

Your role

Lead, plan, and direct multidisciplinary teams in the successful delivery of residential projects.Manage all aspects of project execution, including safety, quality, schedule, and cost control, ensuring alignment with client objectives.Build and maintain long-term relationships with key stakeholders and clients, enhancing AtkinsRéalis' reputation and identifying new business opportunities.Monitor contractor performance to ensure compliance with contractual obligations.Oversee the coordination and management of large-scale building projects, focusing on publicrealm, enabling works, and building assets.Ensure resource allocation meets current and future project demands, maximizing operational efficiency.Ensure the highest standards of Health & Safety on all construction activities.

About You

Degree-qualified in engineering or a related field (BSc, BEng, BA or equivalent); Chartered status preferred.20+ years of experience in construction, with at least 7 years in roles similar to this, focused on large building projects.Expertise in managing large-scale, complex construction operations, particularly within the rail sector.Strong communication and reporting skills, capable of engaging with senior executives and managing client expectations.Demonstrated ability to deliver high-quality projects on time and within budget.Experience in managing multidisciplinary teams and complex stakeholder relationships.A deep understanding of construction techniques, project controls, and safety management.A strategic thinker with the ability to mobilize teams, plan effectively, and manage both technical and commercial aspects of projects.Strong interpersonal skills and ability to build and maintain effective working relationships.A track record of delivering high-profile, large-scale residential projects.

Rewards & benefits

Explore the rewards and benefits that help you thrive – at every stage of your life and your career.

This Includes

Tax-free salary.Comprehensive life insurance coverage.Premium medical insurance for you and your dependents.Generous annual leave balance.Flexible and hybrid work solutions.Remote work opportunities outside of country.Company gratuity scheme.Discretionary bonus program.Annual flight contribution.Relocation assistance.Transportation & housing allowances (available for remote work locations).Employee Wellbeing Program: 24/7 access to specialists in finance, legal matters, family care, personal health, fitness, and nutrition.

Seize every opportunity to sharpen your skills, expand your expertise, and be recognized for the impact you make.

About AtkinsRéalis

We're AtkinsRéalis, a world-class engineering services and nuclear organization. We connect people, data and technology to transform the world's'infrastructure and energy systems. Together, with our industry partners and clients, and our global team of consultants, designers, engineers and project managers, we can change the world. We're committed to leading our clients across our various end markets to engineer a better future for our planet and its people.

Find out more.

data.title: Director of Support Services
data.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Director of Support Services ( UAEN Only ) Job Purpose: To lead and oversee all support service functions including Human Resources, Finance, Procurement, IT, and General Services, ensuring efficient operations, compliance, and alignment with organizational strategy. Key Responsibilities: Lead and manage all support services functions (HR, Finance, Procurement, IT, and Facilities/General Services). Develop and implement strategies to improve operational efficiency and service delivery. Oversee budgeting, financial planning, and cost control across departments. Ensure compliance with government regulations, policies, and internal procedures. Drive digital transformation and process improvement initiatives. Manage vendor relationships, contracts, and procurement processes. Oversee facilities management, including maintenance, security, and logistics. Lead workforce planning, recruitment strategy, and employee services in coordination with HR. Provide regular reports and insights to senior management on performance and risks. Build and lead high-performing teams across all support functions. Qualifications & Experience: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, Finance, or related field (Master’s preferred). Minimum 12–15 years of experience, with at least 5 years in a leadership role. Strong experience managing multiple functions (HR, Finance, Procurement, IT, Facilities). Experience in government or semi-government entities is preferred. Skills & Competencies: Strong leadership and strategic thinking Stakeholder management Financial and operational management Governance and compliance Change management and transformation Communication and decision-making skills

data.title: Head of Operations
data.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Head of Operations We are currently partnering with a confidential organisation operating within the financial markets and trading infrastructure space, who are looking to appoint a senior operations leader to help drive the next phase of growth. This is a high impact leadership opportunity for someone who can bring structure, resilience, and commercial thinking into a fast moving, highly regulated environment. The successful individual will take ownership of the day to day operational backbone of the business, ensuring smooth platform operations, strong governance, effective risk controls, and close alignment across technology, compliance, and wider business functions. The role will also play a key part in strengthening operational scalability, business continuity, and external stakeholder integration as the organisation continues to evolve. This opportunity would suit someone who enjoys building operational maturity in complex environments and who can operate as a strategic partner to leadership while still remaining close enough to execution. It offers strong visibility, broad scope, and the chance to influence how a growing platform is shaped from an infrastructure and operational perspective. Key requirements: • Proven senior leadership experience within an exchange, trading platform, capital markets, or similarly regulated environment • Strong understanding of operational infrastructure, risk, governance, and business continuity • Ability to work cross functionally with technology, product, and compliance teams • Exposure to scaling operations in a fast paced or evolving business • Commercially minded, with the gravitas to engage both internally and externally

data.title: VP Fraud Monitoring
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: The Financial Crime Operations function is part of the credit administration team and provides second line Fraud Risk oversight for the firm’s front office and support / control functions. The role of the VP Fraud Monitoring entails leading and establishing a team of Fraud alert Analysts operating on a 24*7 basis. The encumbent will be responsible to document and implement appropriate SOP’s and SLA’s with various stakeholders. The encumbent is responsible to ensure the effective day to day operations of the alert monitoring team, provide periodic reports and ensure adherence to standards and other predefined requirements in order to timely identify and prevent fraud. The The encumbent is responsible to appropriate handling of alerts with aim of minimizing impact to customer experience and business efficiency, identify emerging risks and trends and closely collaborate with departmental peers to develop mitigation measures aimed at reducing fraud and losses while maximising recovery opportunities

data.title: VP, Business Planning
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Join the UAE’s largest bank and one of the world’s largest and safest financial institutions. Our focus is to create value for our employees, customers, shareholders and communities to grow through differentiation, agility and innovation. We are looking for top talent and your success is our success. Accelerate your growth as you help us reach our goals and advance your career. Be ready to make your mark a top company, in an exciting & dynamic industry. Job Purpose The role is responsible for partnering with WBG, Enablement & Control partners at a group level to drive business management activities such as Strategy and Business Development, Business & Performance Management, Data and Analytics and Lighthouse enhancements Key Accountabilities Key Tasks & Activities: Collaborate with business heads to drive Strategy and Business Development initiatives and assess impact on operational readiness and customer experience. Play a key role in setting up and tracking balanced scorecards for coverage and product teams, lead business management initiatives by collaborating with various internal stakeholders such as Credit, Compliance, Operations, IT, CX, Risk etc. Leverage data analytics to identify potential opportunity to improve overall business performance (revenue and/or cost). Lead simplification of CX E2E journeys to create transformational experiences through digital assets. Drive WBG-wide communication for relevant initiatives (as required). Develop effective relationships including spearheading Change Management within WBG. Behavioural Skills Self-starter - the incumbent must be able to lead workshops and help formulate requirements, options and solutions with an ability to get things done through others; able to identify proactive, innovative solutions to meet the changing needs of the business. Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset. Customer Focus - understand customer perspective when developing requirements and ensuring fit for purpose customer friendly solution are designed. Strong communication skills are required to draw out requirements and to challenge where appropriate and to establish bond with key stakeholders. A high degree of self-assurance/initiative and business sense is required to perform responsibilities independently or collaboratively in a team environment as required Qualifications & Experience Minimum Qualification: Experience of banking industry with deep understanding on the Wholesale Banking. Must have master's or bachelor's degree in information technology or relevant discipline. Minimum Experience 12+ years of experience in Financial Services, Strategy function, Business management and/or Technology execution. With strong written and verbal communication skills with a talent for precise articulations of customer problems. Must have 8+ years of experience in the banking domain. Hands-on experience in executing transformation objectives with ability to structure, manage complex business challenges to advance business and digital strategies. Strong User engagement and communication skills / Ability to contribute to and implement organizational strategy. Capacity to work with people at all levels in an organization and with people from many cultural backgrounds. Able to manage effectively a number of competing priorities. Strategic thinker with ability to lead by example demonstrating an ability to deliver set tasks, objectives and strategic priorities. Project Management Professional. Proficient in MS Office with advanced Excel skills Data Science & Business Analytics, Financial Analysis & Reports.

data.title: Principal Enterprise Architect
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: The future of banking isn't just about "tech"—it’s about the seamless integration of Business Capability and AI-driven Execution . We are seeking a visionary Principal Enterprise Architect for a leading Tier-1 bank in the UAE. This is a high-impact role for a strategist who speaks the language of both a seasoned banker and a cloud-native engineer. Based in the region and ready to lead, you will be the authoritative owner of the enterprise capability landscape, ensuring strategy translates directly into high-performance technical reality. What You’ll Do Daily The Blueprint: Define, model, and manage the enterprise business capability landscape to drive strategic alignment. Technical Excellence: Architect scalable, secure, and cloud-native systems using modern patterns (Microservices, Event-Driven, AI). The Integrator: Act as the "Chief Translator" between business design, strategy, and IT execution. Investment Strategy: Enable portfolio rationalization and operating model design through structured capability heatmapping. Authority: Serve as the primary owner of the capability map and its relationship to journeys, services, and technology. Profile Banking Domain experience Cloud Native: Hands-on experience designing and governing enterprise-scale applications in AWS, Azure, OCI, or GCP. AI Maven: Proven experience integrating AI/ML into enterprise frameworks is a must. Modeling Mastery: High proficiency in architecture tooling (e.g., LeanIX, Mega, BizzDesign, or Sparx EA ). Regional Presence: Ideally currently based in the UAE/GCC with a pulse on the local regulatory and business landscape. Core Competencies Capability Modeling: Mastery of defining and structuring capabilities at all abstraction levels. Strategic Alignment: Linking technical evolution to regulatory changes and business priorities. Governance & Reuse: Reducing duplication and promoting architectural efficiency across domains. Cross-Domain Collaboration: Strong engagement skills across Business, EA, and Transformation teams. This is a chance to lead the architectural evolution of one of the region's most influential financial institutions. If you thrive at the intersection of banking domain knowledge and modern tech, we want to hear from you.

data.title: Test & Commissioning Director
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates Job ID: R0121633 Date Posted: 2026-03-25 Company Name: HITACHI RAIL STS S.P.A. Profession (Job Category): Engineering & Science Job Schedule: Full time Remote: No About Us A career at Hitachi Rail will help create a legacy. With operations in every corner of the world, our work goes to the cutting-edge of digital transformation and technology. From the multi-cultural strength of our global organisation to the sustainable and innovative ways we work to bring people together, there's something for everyone to get stuck into. And that's where you come in. Job Description: T&C Director with below main responsibilities: to ensure the execution of the T&C Program according to the contract requirements and project target regarding safety, quality and schedule. to lead and manage the T&C Team. to interface with Commissioning Managers of other D&B contractors (Trains/Locomotives, Civil Works) to coordinate the readiness of the trains/ locomotives, the external systems and the infrastructures for static and dynamic system integration tests. to interface with External Parties (i.e. Energy Authorities) during Energization process of Power Infeed Sub Stations. to interface with Customer for migration and integration with revenue systems, whereas applicable. to interface with VTA team along V&V process. to interface with Project Engineer for all the needed Design documentation to execute T&C activities (i.e. test plans and procedures). to interface with Construction Manager to coordinate Handover of Systems to start T&C activities. to interface with Project Planner to provide all the inputs for planning and monitoring progress of works. to interface with Project HSE Manager in the preparation of hazard analysis for the execution of works. to interface with Project O&M Manager to coordinate the plan and execution of maintenance works on Systems during T&C stage. to interface with Project Manager to coordinate Handover of Systems to Customer for Trial Operations. to interface with RAMS Manager and C-ISA/E-ISA during execution of safety related testing and commissioning activities. to support the Customer during the Trial Run Operations. to authorize the Test Reports. Thank you for your interest in Hitachi Rail. If your application is of interest, we will be in contact. Please do not hesitate to discover more about us and our latest jobs at https://www.hitachirail.com/careers At Hitachi Rail, there is a place for everyone. We welcome and value differences in background, age, gender, sexuality, family status, disability, race, nationality, ethnicity, religion, and world view. It is our commitment to create an inclusive environment - we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We would be delighted if you would be one of our followers at https://www.linkedin.com/company/hitachirail

data.title: Head of Bancassurance
data.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Summary The Head of Bancassurance will be responsible for building, leading, and scaling the bancassurance vertical at Finance House. This role will drive the strategy, partnerships, product portfolio, and sales execution for insurance distribution through the organization’s channels. The incumbent will play a critical role in establishing bancassurance as a key revenue stream by leveraging customer base, digital platforms, and branch/relationship channels, while ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and delivering superior customer experience. Key Objectives Build and scale the bancassurance business as a core revenue vertical Drive insurance sales through multiple channels (branches, digital, RM network) Establish strong insurer partnerships and product offerings Enhance customer value proposition through integrated financial solutions Ensure regulatory compliance and sustainable business growth Major Responsibilities Strategy & Business Build-Out Define and execute the bancassurance strategy aligned with overall business goals Build the bancassurance function from the ground up, including operating model, structure, and processes Identify target segments, product mix, and go-to-market strategies Establish short-term and long-term growth plans with clear revenue targets Insurance Partnerships & Product Management Identify, evaluate, and onboard insurance partners (life, general, health) Negotiate commercial agreements and partnership frameworks Design and manage a comprehensive insurance product portfolio tailored to customer needs Continuously review product performance and optimize offerings Sales & Distribution Management Drive insurance sales across all distribution channels (Branch network, Relationship Managers, Contact Center and Digital platforms) Define sales strategies, targets, and incentive structures Monitor and improve conversion rates, cross-sell ratios, and productivity Build and lead high-performing sales teams Digital & Customer Experience Enablement Collaborate with Product and Technology teams to embed insurance offerings into digital journeys Enable seamless customer onboarding, policy issuance, and servicing Enhance customer experience through simplified processes and digital solutions Drive adoption of digital channels for insurance sales Stakeholder Management Work closely with internal stakeholders including Retail, Credit, Risk, Operations, and Technology Manage relationships with external partners including insurers, brokers, and regulators Present business performance and strategic plans to senior leadership Regulatory Compliance & Governance Ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements related to insurance distribution Work closely with Compliance and Risk teams to implement robust governance frameworks Ensure proper disclosures, documentation, and adherence to sales practices Mitigate operational and reputational risks Performance Management & Reporting Define and track KPIs including revenue, penetration rates, conversion, persistency, and customer satisfaction Develop dashboards and reporting mechanisms for leadership review Drive a performance-oriented culture across the bancassurance function Financial Management & Profitability Own P&L for the bancassurance business Drive revenue growth while managing cost structures and commission models Develop business cases for new initiatives and partnerships Ensure sustainable and profitable growth Training & Capability Building Design and implement training programs for sales teams and relationship managers Build insurance product knowledge and sales capabilities across the organization Ensure certification and licensing requirements are met Knowledge & Skills Strong expertise in bancassurance, insurance distribution, or wealth management Deep understanding of life, general, and health insurance products Proven ability to build and scale new business verticals Strong commercial acumen and partnership management skills Excellent leadership and team-building capabilities Strong understanding of regulatory frameworks in insurance and financial services Experience in digital enablement and customer journey design Exceptional stakeholder management and influencing skills Qualifications & Experience Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, or related field (MBA preferred) 12 - 15+ years of experience in bancassurance, insurance, or financial services Proven track record in building and managing insurance distribution businesses Experience in UAE/GCC market preferred Relevant certifications in insurance or financial services are an advantage
